channel.description: Recent content in gitosis on Blog of Jason Meridth

item.title: Gotcha with Gitosis and python-setuptools
item.description: Today I decided to upgrade my slicehost slice from Intrepid Ibex to Lucid Lynx (Intrepid → Jaunty → Karmic → Lucid).

item.title: Gitosis and Gitweb - Part 2 - Add Projects and Contributors

item.title: Gitosis and Gitweb - Part 1 - Setup
item.description: I’ve had a number of people ask me where they should host their Git repositories.
